data.body: RE-PUSHED corrected stack with AC1/AC10/AC7 folded (563=TS2+AC1; 580=TS3+AC10+AC7+schema-reg). Fixed schema-coverage (registered verify_identity_report in OUTPUT_SCHEMAS, folded into 580). Pre-push: lint+typecheck+4 drift gates+contracts(132)+identity/authorship/verify sweep(561) ALL GREEN; prior full make test 5653 passed (only known yaml flake + the now-fixed schema-coverage). 5 changes re-CI (563/576/579/580/581); 558/560/561 unchanged. Awaiting all-8-green, then close AC1(401a)/AC10(0fb4)/AC7(bff8) + re-close epic (all ACs now met), submit/land.
